LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTY. CHUNG S. POON'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF KEVIN ROONEY IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-05-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance, no objection filed, and the court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Continued To May-05-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to May-05-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
